title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: This is a two-stage encounter. Choosing [gold]Nab[/gold] adds an [red]Injury[/red] curse to your deck and immediately offers a random relic, but you take a hit from one of the constructs before succeeding. Choosing [gold]I Can Take Them[/gold] leads to combat against two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold]. Victory grants [gold]Greater Rewards[/gold]: a random relic and a random potion. During the initial event, the two constructs continuously punch each other for visual atmosphere.
